sections.heading: Digital manufacturing trends Q2 2018
sections.text: Digital manufacturing trends Q2 2018 The newly named Digital Manufacturing Trends for Q2-2018 has been released.

sections.heading: Trending Printers
sections.text: The newly named Digital Manufacturing Trends for Q2-2018 has been released, you can check it out here . The reason for the name change? Protolabs Network now provides a plethora of manufacturing technologies which will gradually be added to the report creating a comprehensive look at the state of digital manufacturing, all in one place. Since Q1-2018 three areas of data are omitted which can still be found below. The reason for this change is down to the Protolabs Network waiting list being introduced to help balance supply and demand geographically. This waiting list has meant a slow down in new printers added making categories such as Trending Printers, Printer Model distribution and Prin...
